title: Festuca jurtzevii
taxonomy: Festuca jurtzevii is classified as a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Festuca, a group of grasses commonly known as fescues. Festuca jurtzevii is further classified as a member of the subgenus Festuca, within the tribe Poeae. The species is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It is a cold-tolerant grass, often found in high-altitude meadows and rocky outcrops.
